name: Szechuan Chicken (Kang Pao Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken-breast halves, skinned, boned, and cubed to 3/4 in size
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cubed chicken with the egg white and cornstarch. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry chicken for 3 to 4 minutes, until cooked through.
3. Add nuts, scallions, and remaining ingredients. Heat thoroughly and serve immediately with rice.
